assessment.note: He directly confirms reduced presence in team rituals, which is a strong engagement dip and a mild wellbeing concern.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
new_queue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

new_queue.label: Rituals shift
new_queue.name: I've noticed you've been quieter in a few team rituals since the promotion decision — what's changed for you there?
new_queue.description: Uses an observable shift to invite his version of what changed without assuming the cause.

new_queue.label: Decision takeaway
new_queue.name: What did you take away from the promotion feedback that still feels true today?
new_queue.description: Surfaces what he actually heard and believed, rather than the manager's interpretation.

new_queue.label: Open invitation
new_queue.name: Is there anything on your mind that we haven't made space to talk about?
new_queue.description: Intentionally open; lets them name the thing before the manager assumes.

new_queue.label: Unsaid piece
new_queue.name: What part of that decision feels most unfinished for you now?
new_queue.description: Gently probes unresolved disappointment without naming it for him.

new_queue.label: Feedback gap
new_queue.name: What feedback do you think was missing from that conversation?
new_queue.description: Looks for the missing information that would change how he interprets the setback.

new_queue.label: Mentoring fit
new_queue.name: How is the mentoring program fitting alongside your core product work right now?
new_queue.description: Tests whether the mentoring work is a healthy stretch or a quiet detour.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes on concrete support and next-step stability without opening a new issue.
